2606.16042.title: Leveraging Deep Learning for Object and Position Recognition of Load Carriers for Autonomous Logistics Vehicles
2606.16042.paper_summary:
This work explores the use of artificial intelligence in mobile robotics to achieve autonomous detection and pose estimation of load carriers for automated pickup. A deep neural network is designed to recognize predefined landmarks on the carrier from RGBD data; these landmarks are then used to compute the carrier's pose. The network operates directly on RGBD images to estimate landmark positions, which form the basis for determining the carrier's location. The approach is validated in extensive experiments and comprises both software and hardware implementations.
  A deep learning-based framework is presented to detect load carriers and estimate their pose for use with autonomous logistics vehicles. Our method uses a convolutional neural network to identify characteristic reference points on the carrier from RGBD input and computes its pose by combining these inferred landmarks with prior geometric knowledge. Experiments show that the resulting accuracy is sufficient for reliable load carrier detection in industrial environments, confirming the suitability of the method for autonomous intralogistics applications.
2606.16042.paper_summary_zh: 這項工作探討了在移動機器人中使用人工智慧，以實現自動檢測和姿態估計負載承載體以進行自動化拾取。設計了一個深度神經網絡來識別承載體上預定義的地標，這些地標來自RGBD數據；然後這些地標被用來計算承載體的姿態。該網絡直接在RGBD圖像上運作，以估計地標位置，這些位置構成了確定承載體位置的基礎。該方法在廣泛的實驗中得到了驗證，並包括軟體和硬體的實現。<lb/>提出了一個基於深度學習的框架，用於檢測負載承載體並估計其姿態，以便用於自主物流車輛。我們的方法使用卷積神經網絡從RGBD輸入中識別承載體上的特徵參考點，並通過將這些推斷的地標與先前的幾何知識結合來計算其姿態。實驗顯示，所得到的準確性足以在工業環境中可靠地檢測負載承載體，確認該方法適用於自主內部物流應用。
2606.16042.author: Christoph Legat et.al.
2606.16042.authors: Christoph Legat, Tobias Miller, Marco Riess
